title: CodexReviewReport
description: Structured output for Codex pre-push reviews of the Waves Customer Portal. The reviewer must return a JSON object matching this schema — nothing else.

summary.description: One-paragraph plain-English summary of the diff and the overall verdict. Must mention whether any P0 issues were found.

findings.description: Zero or more issues identified in the diff. Empty array means no issues found at any priority.

priority.description: P0 = must-fix before push (security, money, data loss). P1 = should-fix soon (correctness, footgun). P2 = nit / suggestion.

file.description: Path relative to repo root, e.g. server/routes/pay-v2.js.

line.description: 1-indexed line number in the file. Null if the finding is file-wide or applies to a deletion.

title.description: Short headline for the finding (≤ 100 chars).

description.description: What is wrong, why it matters, and what to change. Reference the AGENTS.md rule when applicable.
